creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 257630
update to rc.4

updated for your rc.4 commit in the klee repo, and minor polishing for
port tools (portclippy, portfmt, portlint).

There's a poudriere built port for `pkg add https://pkg.skunkwerks.at/FreeBSD:14:amd64/All/kleene-cli-0.1.0.pkg` but pkg-add doesn't fetch
the dependencies.
